name: HTTPX
author: Security Assessment Dashboard
description: Fast and multi-purpose HTTP toolkit from ProjectDiscovery. Detects installation and version only in this phase — no scan is executed.

install_instructions.linux: A Go binary: `go install github.com/projectdiscovery/httpx/cmd/httpx@latest`, or install from the AUR (`yay -S httpx`). See docs/LINUX_TOOL_INSTALLATION.md for details.
